subject: npmx Weekly #12
headline: npmx Weekly #12
intro: Exciting enhancements and updates are rolling out this week! Dive into the latest features designed to improve your experience and bolster security within the npmx platform.

topics.title: Feature Enhancements for Comparison Page
topics.summary: New features, including GitHub stars and issues, have been added to the comparison page, providing users with comprehensive insights based on their requests.

topics.title: GitHub Actions Updates
topics.summary: Major version upgrades for actions/download-artifact and actions/upload-artifact introduce support for direct uploads and improved artifact handling, ensuring compatibility with Node.js 24.

topics.title: Download Graph Discrepancies
topics.summary: Users have reported significant discrepancies in download statistics between npmx and npmjs, prompting investigations to ensure data accuracy.
